contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: LiteLLM harness — replace homegrown regex XML/DSML parsing with robust library
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/52
  
  Details:
  Replaced the homegrown HTTP transport + regex-based DeepSeek XML/DSML tool-call parsing with litellm, a battle-tested LLM abstraction library.
  
  Changes:
  - New LiteLLMProvider in app/llm/litellm_provider.py using litellm.completion()
  - Registered 'litellm' provider in registry alongside existing deepseek/bigmodel
  - Added LITELLM_MODEL=deepseek/deepseek-chat config
  - Added litellm>=1.75.0 dependency
  - Switched production to LLM_PROVIDER=litellm
  
  Why:
  - DeepSeek sometimes emits tool calls as raw XML in content instead of standard tool_calls — a class of bugs regex cannot fully close
  - Litellm handles provider quirks natively — tool calls always come back as standard arrays
  - Built-in retry, better error classification
  - One-line config change to switch to Claude/OpenAI later
  
  PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/52
  Roadmap: agentic_ai_context/AUTOPILOT_LITELLM_MIGRATION.md
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
